title: ADR
description: Schema for forge-harness's auto-canonicalised Architecture Decision Records under `docs/decisions/ADR-NNNN-<slug>-<storyId>.md`. Each ADR file MUST begin with a YAML front-matter block matching `frontMatter`; the body MUST contain the four named sections in `bodySectionsRequired`. Validators (scripts/validate-adr.mjs) parse the Markdown into the shape described here.

adr.description: Monotonic ADR number, zero-padded to 4 digits in the filename. Assigned by adr-extractor as max(existing) + 1.

status.description: Lifecycle state. New ADRs are written as `Accepted` post-PASS; later supersession promotes the older record to `Superseded`.

story.description: Story id (e.g. US-01) that owned the decision. Matches the suffix of the filename and the `story` column in INDEX.md.

date.description: ISO-8601 calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD) the decision was canonicalised.

title.description: One-line decision title. Used verbatim as the row hook in INDEX.md.

supersedes.description: If set, the prior ADR number this one replaces. Optional.

supersededBy.description: If set, the ADR number that replaces this one. Optional.

bodySectionsRequired.description: Required H2 sections under each ADR. The validator asserts each `## <name>` heading is present (case-sensitive, in any order).
